heroHeadline: BTS Makes History: ARIRANG First K-pop Album with Back-to-Back Billboard 200 #1s — World Tour Kicks Off April 9
heroSubtitle: Tracking 4,680+ days of K-pop history — ARIRANG (released March 20, 2026) becomes the first K-pop album ever to hold #1 on the Billboard 200 for two consecutive weeks (641K + 187K units). Deluxe vinyl released April 3 with Suga's hidden track 'Come Over.' Visa named Worldwide Tour Sponsor. Arirang World Tour opens April 9 in Goyang, South Korea.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, and Recording Academy.
